subject: horned minotaur warlord raising a bloodied axe overhead amid a battlefield
description: A massive minotaur figure dominates the foreground, mid-roar with mouth open and teeth bared, hoisting a heavy double-bladed axe overhead in a two-handed grip. The axe blade drips dark red. Two long curved horns sweep up from his head; thick dark hair and a wild beard frame a weathered red-skinned face. He wears spiked dark plate armor over bare brawny shoulders and chest, with manacles, hooks, and chain-links hanging from his belt and gear. Behind him a smoky, ember-lit battlefield glows orange and red, with the silhouettes of a marching army stretching back toward a hazy horizon. Painterly action illustration with strong rim light from the burning sky.
foreground: horned minotaur warlord with raised bloody axe in spiked armor
background: smoky battlefield with marching army silhouettes under an ember-lit sky
